title: Lords of Minecraft QoL Modpack
description: Modpack of quality-of-life and performance mods for roleplaying on Lords of Minecraft
body:
Modpack of Quality-of-Life mods for roleplaying on Lords of Minecraft

### ⚠ Warning! ⚠  
This modpack has not been extensively tested. If you notice any problems, hotkey conflicts, or awkward mod settings, please let Dani know!

## Disabled by default
Some mods are disabled by default. Feel free to enable them at your own convenience!
| Mod | Reason |
|---|---|
| [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby) | Bobby uses a lot of RAM to render more of the world |
| [Tweakeroo](https://modrinth.com/mod/tweakeroo) | For advanced users. It has a lot of settings |
